'''dhodadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:publichearted|publichearted]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:publichearted|publichearted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhodadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodadithi|dhodadithi]] || [[word:dhodadiji|dhodadiji]] || [[word:dhodadishi|dhodadishi]] || [[word:dhodadiki|dhodadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodaduthuthu|dhodaduthuthu]] || [[word:dhodadujuju|dhodadujuju]] || [[word:dhodadushushu|dhodadushushu]] || [[word:dhodadukuku|dhodadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodaduthu|dhodaduthu]] || [[word:dhodaduju|dhodaduju]] || [[word:dhodadushu|dhodadushu]] || [[word:dhodaduku|dhodaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodadufthuf|dhodadufthuf]] || [[word:dhodadufjuf|dhodadufjuf]] || [[word:dhodadufshuf|dhodadufshuf]] || [[word:dhodadufkuf|dhodadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodadethe|dhodadethe]] || [[word:dhodadeje|dhodadeje]] || [[word:dhodadeshe|dhodadeshe]] || [[word:dhodadeke|dhodadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodadothotho|dhodadothotho]] || [[word:dhodadojojo|dhodadojojo]] || [[word:dhodadoshosho|dhodadoshosho]] || [[word:dhodadokoko|dhodadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodadotho|dhodadotho]] || [[word:dhodadojo|dhodadojo]] || [[word:dhodadosho|dhodadosho]] || [[word:dhodadoko|dhodadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodadofthof|dhodadofthof]] || [[word:dhodadofjof|dhodadofjof]] || [[word:dhodadofshof|dhodadofshof]] || [[word:dhodadofkof|dhodadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodadïfthïf|dhodadïfthïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfjïf|dhodadïfjïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfshïf|dhodadïfshïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfkïf|dhodadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodadïfthïfthïf|dhodadïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfjïfjïf|dhodadïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfshïfshïf|dhodadïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfkïfkïf|dhodadïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodadïfthïf|dhodadïfthïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfjïf|dhodadïfjïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfshïf|dhodadïfshïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfkïf|dhodadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodadïfthïf|dhodadïfthïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfjïf|dhodadïfjïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfshïf|dhodadïfshïf]] || [[word:dhodadïfkïf|dhodadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodadæthæ|dhodadæthæ]] || [[word:dhodadæjæ|dhodadæjæ]] || [[word:dhodadæshæ|dhodadæshæ]] || [[word:dhodadækæ|dhodadækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodadathatha|dhodadathatha]] || [[word:dhodadajaja|dhodadajaja]] || [[word:dhodadashasha|dhodadashasha]] || [[word:dhodadakaka|dhodadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodadatha|dhodadatha]] || [[word:dhodadaja|dhodadaja]] || [[word:dhodadasha|dhodadasha]] || [[word:dhodadaka|dhodadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodadafthaf|dhodadafthaf]] || [[word:dhodadafjaf|dhodadafjaf]] || [[word:dhodadafshaf|dhodadafshaf]] || [[word:dhodadafkaf|dhodadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhodadasha|dhodadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodadshësha|dhodadshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodadrosha|dhodadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodadmusha|dhodadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodadyasha|dhodadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodadnkshësha|godhodadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodadnkrosha|godhodadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodadnkmusha|godhodadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodadnkyasha|godhodadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhodadadasha|dhodadadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodadadshësha|dhodadadshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodadadrosha|dhodadadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodadadmusha|dhodadadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodadadyasha|dhodadadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodadadnkshësha|godhodadadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodadadnkrosha|godhodadadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodadadnkmusha|godhodadadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodadadnkyasha|godhodadadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhedædasha|dhedædasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhedædshësha|dhedædshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhedædrosha|dhedædrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhedædmusha|dhedædmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhedædyasha|dhedædyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhedædnkshësha|godhedædnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhedædnkrosha|godhedædnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhedædnkmusha|godhedædnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhedædnkyasha|godhedædnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhodfadasha|dhodfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodfadshësha|dhodfadshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodfadrosha|dhodfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodfadmusha|dhodfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodfadyasha|dhodfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodfadnkshësha|godhodfadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodfadnkrosha|godhodfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodfadnkmusha|godhodfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodfadnkyasha|godhodfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
